name: LineSegment
comment:
This module exposes the lineSegment type. Values of this type
can be manipulated mathematically and rendered in to SVG.


# API

@docs LineSegment, affineTransform, draw, moveTo, moveBy, scaleBy

aliases.name: LineSegment
aliases.comment:
A record which models a line segment with
endpoints a and b.
aliases.type: { a : Vector, b : Vector, width : Float, strokeColor : ColorRecord, fillColor : ColorRecord }

values.name: affineTransform
values.comment: Apply an affine transform to a lineSegment.

values.name: draw
values.comment: Produce an SVG representation of a lineSegment.

values.name: moveBy
values.comment: Translate a lineSegment.

values.name: moveTo
values.comment:
Move a lineSegment to a new position: translante
it so that its first endpoint is at the given position.

values.name: scaleBy
values.comment:
Scale a line segment by a factor. That is,
dilate with center at the origin.

name: Shape
comment:
This module exposes the Shape type. Values of this type
can be manipulated mathematically and rendered in to SVG.


# API

@docs Shape, ShapeData, affineTransform, draw, moveBy, moveTo, scaleBy

unions.name: Shape
unions.comment: A type for representing shapes: rectangles or ellipses

aliases.name: ShapeData
aliases.comment:
A type for representing the data needed
to define a shape.
aliases.type: { center : Vector, dimensions : Vector, strokeColor : ColorRecord, fillColor : ColorRecord }

values.name: affineTransform
values.comment: Transformm a shape by an affine function.

values.name: draw
values.comment: Produce an SVG representation of a shape.

values.name: moveBy
values.comment: Translate the center of a shape.

values.name: moveTo
values.comment: Move the center of a shape.

values.name: scaleBy
values.comment: Rescale a shape.

name: Affine
comment:
This module exposes two functions, affineTransform and linearTransorm, for mapping
2D vecors to 2D vectors.


# API

@docs Coefficients, affineTransform, linearTransform, coefficients

aliases.name: Coefficients
aliases.comment:
Coefficients is a data structure for the
coefficients of an affine transformation

xx = ax + b
yy= cy + d
aliases.type: { a : Float, b : Float, c : Float, d : Float }

values.name: affineTransform
values.comment:
affineTransform coefficients is an affine
transformations mapping vectors to vectors.

values.name: coefficients
values.comment:
The coefficients function maps a pair
of rectangles, sourceRect and targetRect,
to a record of coeffients for an affine
transformation. The resulting transformation
maps sourceRect to targetRect.

values.name: linearTransform
values.comment:
linearTransform coefficients is an affine
transformations mapping vectors to vectors.

name: ColorRecord
comment:
This module exposes the ColorRecord type. Color records
can be manipulated mathemaitcall, e.g., if x and y are
color records, then so is mix x y -- it is a kind of average
of x and y .

The function rgba x y converts a color record to a string compatible
with SVG.


# API

@docs ColorRecord, rgba, mix

aliases.name: ColorRecord
aliases.comment: A record which represents a color.
aliases.type: { r : Int, g : Int, b : Int, a : Float }

values.name: mix
values.comment: Take the average of two ColorRecords

values.name: rgba
values.comment: Convert a ColorRecord into a string compatible with SVG

name: Vector

aliases.name: DirectedSegment
aliases.comment: A directed line segment with endponts a and b.

values.name: add
values.comment: The sum of two vectors.

values.name: angle
values.comment: the angle in radians between vectors

values.name: distance
values.comment: The the distance between points represented by vectors

values.name: dot
values.comment: The dot product of vectors.

values.name: mul
values.comment: The scalar product of a vector and a number.

values.name: normSquared
values.comment: The square of the norm of a vector.

values.name: rotate
values.comment:
Rotate a vector counterclockwise by the
given angle (in radians).

values.name: sub
values.comment: The difference of two vectors.
